reasoning: The Lean statement matches the informal statement exactly. E : Set ℝ and f : ℝ → ℝ correspond to "E in R^1" and "real function". The hypothesis `UniformContinuousOn f E` captures "uniformly continuous on E", and `Bornology.IsBounded E` captures "bounded set E". The conclusion `Bornology.IsBounded (Set.image f E)` is the standard way to express "f is bounded on E" — the image of E under f is a bounded set of reals, equivalent to saying there exists M with |f(x)| ≤ M for all x ∈ E. No hypotheses are added or dropped, and no types are changed.
